# NavBar

<!-- generated by rtdf-skill component reference generator -->

- Category: Navigation
- Route nav: `navBar`

## Offline Documentation

This file embeds the English component guide, API, FAQ, and version documentation. Treat the content below as the bundled documentation source for ordinary RTDF projects that only install the npm `rtdf` package.

## guide

## Explanation

On mobile devices, the NavBar is generally used to display the current page and to perform routing operations at the top of the page. RTDF's NavBar consists of three parts: left, center, and right, and each part supports ReactNode rendering. The class of the outermost element also supports injClass (class injection).

## Extension

The existing parameters are sufficient to meet most business scenarios. For example, the common scene of changing the transparency of the NavBar background and text color based on the scrolling of the page can be achieved through injClass. If you are still not satisfied with your needs, combining ReactNode and injClass, theoretically the NavBar can be customized to any style you want, not only for use as a top navigation bar.

It should be noted that this extension only provides a method and idea. Too much customization may already be more complex than writing a component yourself, and may lose the meaning of using a component library.

## api

## NavBar Props

| Name       | Type                                                                      | Default                       | Required | Description                                                                         |
| ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------- | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| title      | `string`                                                                  | Current language navBar.title | N        | Title text.                                                                         |
| titleAlign | `'left'\|'center'\|'right'`                                               | `'left'`                      | N        | Title alignment.                                                                    |
| left       | `'back'\|null`\|[`Icon`](/components?nav=icon&tab=1) | `'back'`                      | N        | Left content, `'back'` for back icon, `null` for no content, otherwise render icon. |
| rights     | [`Icon[]`](/components?nav=icon&tab=1)               | `[]`                          | N        | Right content array of Icon Props, recommend no more than 3 icons.                  |
| line       | `boolean`                                                                 | `true`                        | N        | Whether to show bottom divider line.                                                |
| injClass   | `string`                                                                  | `''`                          | N        | Inject CSS class name.                                                              |
| love       | `boolean`                                                                 | `false`                       | N        | Whether to enable care version.                                                     |

## NavBar Events

| Name         | Type                      | Parameters                 | Description                         |
| ------------ | ------------------------- | -------------------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| onClickLeft  | `() => void`              | -                          | Triggered when clicking left icon.  |
| onclickLeft | `() => void`              | -                          | Triggered when clicking left icon. Lowercase event alias compatible with STDF migration. |
| onClickRight | `(index: number) => void` | index - Clicked icon index | Triggered when clicking right icon. |
| onclickRight | `(index: number) => void` | index - Clicked icon index | Triggered when clicking right icon. Lowercase event alias compatible with STDF migration. |

## NavBar Children

| Name       | Type                                                                | Parameters | Description                     |
| ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------- | ------------------------------- |
| titleChild | ReactNode | -          | Renders title area when passed. |
| leftChild  | ReactNode | -          | Renders left area when passed.  |
| rightChild | ReactNode | -          | Renders right area when passed. |
